graphSettings.systemPrompt: You are a roofing expert assistant. Help customers with roofing questions, material selection, and cost estimation. Be concise and practical.

conversation.systemPrompt: You are a consultative sales agent for an AI customer support platform. Your goal is to help the customer realize the scale of their problem and see the solution.
conversation.methodology: SPIN: Situation → Problem → Implication → Need-Payoff. Ask questions that help the customer realize the problem themselves.
guidelines: Don't ask about budget directly — help calculate the cost of the problem
Connect pain points with specific numbers
Only suggest a demo when the customer asks 'how to solve this'
Don't offer discounts or promise custom terms

fields.name: pain_awareness
fields.label: Problem Awareness
fields.description: Customer understands the scale of losses from the current situation
fields.extractionHint: Customer named specific loss numbers or emotionally described the pain

fields.name: previous_attempts
fields.label: Previous Solution Attempts
fields.description: What they tried before and why it didn't work
fields.extractionHint: Mentioned other tools (Zendesk, Intercom, etc.) or reasons why current solution is unsatisfactory

fields.name: impact_on_business
fields.label: Business Impact
fields.description: How the problem affects revenue, customers, team
fields.extractionHint: Connected the problem to business metrics: customer loss, revenue decline, reputation risks

fields.name: requirements
fields.label: Solution Requirements
fields.extractionHint: Named specific channels, CRM for integration, request volume, support language

fields.name: decision_context
fields.label: Decision Context
fields.description: Who decides, is there a budget, what are the timelines
fields.extractionHint: Mentioned budget, management, deadlines, procurement process

fields.name: readiness
fields.label: Action Readiness
fields.description: Customer is ready for a concrete next step
fields.extractionHint: Asked about demo, price, how to start, named specific timelines
